tool_args.label: Bx6 ridership declining slower than borough average

payload.claim_text: Bus ridership in both the Bronx and along the Bx6 route has been decreasing. However, ridership along the Bx6 corridor is declining at a slower rate than the borough average.
payload.subject: Bx6 corridor ridership
payload.description: Bx6 ridership trend relative to Bronx average

tool_args.label: Bx6 bus reliability improved

payload.claim_text: Bus reliability has improved with fewer buses arriving late and less bus 'bunching'.
payload.subject: Bx6 bus reliability
payload.description: Reliability improvement after SBS implementation

tool_args.label: Bx6 bus speeds pandemic spike then trending back

payload.claim_text: Bus speeds spiked at height of pandemic but are trending back to pre-pandemic levels.
payload.subject: Bx6-SBS bus speeds
payload.description: Bus speed trends during and after pandemic
